description:
With direct dispatch in place (22.11), closure bodies can return RawInt/RawF64 safely — every caller resolves the body sid and matches its ABI. The closure_target_fns tagged_return_fns seed and the arg-slot Tagged force at closure body param_reprs are now redundant scaffolding.

This subsumes fz-ul4.27.22.6 entirely.

## Scope

In src/ir_codegen.rs:

1. Drop closure_target_fns seed from tagged_return_fns (line ~2378-2391):
   - Old: tagged_return_fns is initialized as closure_target_fns ∪ { fn whose exit is TailCallClosure }.
   - New: tagged_return_fns initialized as ∅ (or only retain the TailCallClosure-exit seed if 22.11's union-fallback still requires it; verify experimentally).

2. Drop arg-slot Tagged force at closure body param_reprs (line ~2349-2355):
   - Old: for closure_target_fns specs, param_reprs is fully Tagged.
   - New: closure_target spec param_reprs honors build_param_reprs' typed output across both capture and arg slots. The 22.5 capture-slot fix already covers the capture half; this ticket covers the arg half.

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green.
- fz dump fixtures/apply2.fz: apply2 spec @abi is (RawInt) -> RawInt (both single-call-shape specs). double_s4 / neg_s5 emit RawInt return; main reads RawInt via cont.
- fz dump fixtures/closure_typed_captures.fz: lambda_3_s8 @abi is (RawInt, RawInt, RawInt) -> RawInt; ishl_imm/bor_imm/sshr_imm all gone at the lambda boundary.
- expect_clif assertions across closure fixtures pass: existing add1/tail_recursion/closure_typed_captures hold; add new assertions on apply2/higher_order verifying direct return_call to body fns.
- Spawn fixtures (spawn_with_captures, concurrency_ping_pong) green on all three paths.
- Close fz-ul4.27.22.6 as superseded.

## Out of scope

- Halt-kind plumbing from fc1ff766 — left in tree; reassess in 22.14.
- pure_forwarder analysis — left in tree; reassess in 22.14.

## BLOCKED BY

- fz-ul4.27.22.11 [[fz-cps-seam.codegen-direct]]

## UNBLOCKS

- fz-cps-seam.union-singletons: direct dispatch for union of closure_lits
title: fz-cps-seam.force-drop: drop closure_target_fns tagged-return seed + arg-slot force (subsumes 22.6)
